examples.description: toddler well-child check, immunization status discussed

transcript.text: Just the 18-month check-up. He's doing well, walking everywhere, says about ten words.
Any concerns with eating or sleeping? He eats well, sleeps through the night.
Weight is at the 50th percentile, height 60th. Up to date on vaccines including MMR.

claims.text: Caregiver reports child is walking everywhere and saying about ten words.
claims.source_quote: walking everywhere, says about ten words

claims.text: Caregiver reports child eats well and sleeps through the night.
claims.source_quote: He eats well, sleeps through the night.

claims.text: Caregiver reports the child is walking and using approximately ten words at 18 months.
claims.source_quote: walking everywhere, says about ten words

claims.text: Physician noted child is up to date on vaccines including MMR.
claims.source_quote: Up to date on vaccines including MMR.

claims.text: Physician noted weight at the 50th percentile and height at the 60th percentile.
claims.source_quote: Weight is at the 50th percentile, height 60th.
